description: Tracks every competition prompt, expected behavior, and best score achieved

prompts.prompt: Create the customer Brightstone Ltd with organization number 853284882. The address is Parkveien 61, 5003 Bergen. Email: post@brightstone.no.
prompts.notes: Address, email, org number all verified

prompts.prompt: Erstellen Sie den Kunden Bergwerk GmbH mit der Organisationsnummer 946768693. Die Adresse ist Solveien 5, 3015 Drammen. E-Mail: post@bergwerk.no.
Créez trois départements dans Tripletex : "Økonomi", "Kvalitetskontroll" et "Markedsføring".
Opprett tre avdelinger i Tripletex: "Økonomi", "Markedsføring" og "Kvalitetskontroll".
Create three departments in Tripletex: "Innkjøp", "Drift", and "Kundeservice".
Crea el producto "Mantenimiento" con número de producto 7266. El precio es 650 NOK sin IVA, utilizando la tasa estándar del 25 %.
Crea el proyecto "Actualización Sierra" vinculado al cliente Sierra SL (org. nº 953403188). El director del proyecto es Ana Romero (ana.romero@example.org).
Registrer leverandøren Sjøbris AS med organisasjonsnummer 811212717. E-post: faktura@sjbris.no.
prompts.notes: Consistently 6/7 — missing 1 check, unknown which field

prompts.prompt: Wir haben einen neuen Mitarbeiter namens Anna Schneider, geboren am 6. August 2000. Bitte legen Sie ihn als Mitarbeiter mit der E-Mail anna.schneider@example.org und dem Startdatum 17. March 2026 an.
Registrer en reiseregning for Magnus Haugen (magnus.haugen@example.org) for "Kundebesøk Bergen". Reisen varte 4 dager med diett (dagsats 800 kr). Utlegg: flybillett 5050 kr og taxi 750 kr.
prompts.notes: Added travelDetails + fixed flight category. Missing 2.5 checks — possibly per diem compensation vs cost

prompts.prompt: Vi har mottatt faktura INV-2026-3624 fra leverandøren Tindra AS (org.nr 983514650) på 42100 kr inklusiv MVA. Beløpet gjelder kontortjenester (konto 6540). Registrer leverandørfakturaen med korrekt inngående MVA (25 %).
prompts.notes: Sometimes 8/8, sometimes 2/8. Sandbox-dependent. Using dual approach (supplierInvoice + voucher)

prompts.prompt: Kjør lønn for Erik Nilsen (erik.nilsen@example.org) for denne måneden. Grunnlønn er 53350 kr. Legg til en engangsbonus på 11050 kr i tillegg til grunnlønnen.
prompts.notes: salary/transaction API 422 in sandbox. Voucher fallback scores 0. Need employment record.

prompts.prompt: Opprett og send en faktura til kunden Testfirma AS (org.nr. 987654321) på 15000 NOK uten MVA. Fakturaen gjelder Konsulentbistand.
prompts.notes: Sometimes 6/7 — added invoice send. Need to verify improvement.

prompts.prompt: Registe 23 horas para Tiago Santos (tiago.santos@example.org) na atividade "Analyse" do projeto "Integração de plataforma" para Floresta Lda (org. nº 889395338). Taxa horária: 1050 NOK/h.
prompts.notes: Hourly project invoice — creates project + timesheet + invoice

prompts.prompt: Sett fastpris 374900 kr på prosjektet "Datasikkerhet" for Snøhetta AS (org.nr 840786692). Prosjektleder er Jonas Larsen. Fakturer kunden for 75 % av fastprisen som en delbetaling.
prompts.notes: Sometimes 8/8, sometimes 6/8. Fixed fixedprice (lowercase) + PM always set.

prompts.prompt: Create an invoice with three product lines with different VAT rates (25%, 15%, 0%)
prompts.notes: Products created with VAT, product codes extracted from descriptions. Need more testing.

prompts.prompt: Order with products → convert to invoice → register full payment
prompts.notes: Find-or-create products fixed this from 6.5 to 8/8

prompts.prompt: Create accounting dimension with values + post voucher linked to dimension

known_issues: run_payroll: salary/transaction needs employment record — 0/8 always
register_supplier_invoice: sandbox-dependent — postings have zero amounts in some sandboxes
create_travel_expense: 5.5/8 — travelDetails added, flight category fixed, but still not 8/8
create_invoice: sometimes 6/7 — added send, not yet verified
fixes_applied: PM name: allow lowercase words between keyword and name
Product: accept productName, netPrice, unitPrice, number keys
Product: extract code from description parentheses
Invoice: create products per line with correct VAT
Payment: calculate total incl VAT from netAmount
Accounting dimension: handle nested voucher data
